---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Dr. George Davys"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Dr. George Davys

**Dates:** (1780-1864)

### Description

Bishop of Peterborough

### Biography

An evangelical, he was editor of the <i>Cottagers' Monthly Visitor</i>.  He married (1814) Marianne Mapletoft, a childhood friend of FMY.  He was made D.D. and became Dean of Chester in 1831;  he became Bishop of Peterborough in 1839. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 22 1899
- Letter from May 21st [1886]
- Letter from June 6 th [1882]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
